audit_items.proof_trace: The `s_entered` flag is set to `true` at line 418 before any external call, so any reentrant invocation of `bid()` via `_multiCall` immediately reverts with `ReentrantCall` at line 415-417. The flag is only reset at line 457 after all operations complete, and no code in the `auctionCallback`→`_multiCall` path can clear it (confirmed by grep: only lines 418 and 457 write to `s_entered`).
